song.title: I Heard the Voice of Jesus Say
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I heard the voice of Jesus say, “Come unto Me, and rest; Lay down, thou weary one, lay down Thy head upon My breast.”|| I came to Jesus as I was, Weary, and worn, and sad; I found in Him a resting place, And He has made me glad.
[V2] 2) I heard the voice of Jesus say, “Behold, I freely give The living water; thirsty one, Stoop down, and drink, and live.|| ” I came to Jesus, and I drank Of that life-giving stream; My thirst was quenched, my soul revived, And now I live in Him.
[V3] 3) I heard the voice of Jesus say, “I am this dark world’s Light; Look unto Me, thy morn shall rise, And all thy day be bright.”|| I looked to Jesus, and I found In Him my Star, my Sun; And in that Light of life I’ll walk Till trav’ling days are done.
song.author: Horatious Bonar
